title: tephroseris integrifolia subsp. igoschinae
intro: Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. igoschinae is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. igoschinae include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
